summary: Comprehensive testing of CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism) module. All 34 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: 5 tabs working (Overview, Products, Suppliers, Country Risk, Cost Projections), dashboard stats displaying correctly, charts rendering, add supplier functionality working.
seed_data_creation: CBAM data already seeded: 15 products, 20 countries, 24 certificate prices, 1 supplier with emissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: CBAM module fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /seed, GET /dashboard, GET /products, GET /products/sectors/summary, POST /suppliers, GET /suppliers, DELETE /suppliers/{id}, POST /emissions, GET /emissions, POST /calculate-cost, GET /countries, GET /certificate-prices, GET /free-allocation-schedule, GET /ets-price-scenarios, GET /suppliers/{id}/projections. Frontend at /cbam has 5 tabs: Overview (ETS price chart, free allocation chart), Products (15 products table), Suppliers (add form + list with risk badges), Country Risk (20 countries table), Cost Projections (select supplier to view). All APIs return correct EU CBAM regulation data.
passed_tests: TestCBAMProducts::test_products_have_required_fields - id, cn_code, hs_code, sector, product_name, emissions
TestCBAMSuppliers::test_create_supplier_with_auto_risk - India supplier gets Very High risk
TestCBAMCountryRisk::test_countries_with_carbon_pricing - GB, CH, NO have carbon pricing
CBAM page loads at /cbam route after login
Dashboard stats: 15 Products, 20 Countries, Total CO2 (7,400 tonnes)
5 tabs present: Overview, Products, Suppliers, Country Risk, Cost Projections
Overview tab: EU ETS Price Scenarios line chart (3 scenarios), Free Allocation Phase-Out bar chart
Products tab: 15 products in table with CN codes, sectors, emissions (direct/indirect/total)
Suppliers tab: Add supplier form (name + country code), supplier list with risk badges (High/Very High)
Country Risk tab: 20 countries with carbon pricing (Yes/No), prices, grid EF, risk categories
Cost Projections tab: Shows 'Select a supplier' message when no supplier selected
Add supplier functionality: Created test supplier with TR (Turkey) - High risk auto-assigned
